title: Day Trading Win: TSLA (22.9.2025) - All targets hit in first 30 min
author: Finnext-AI
selftext:
Today’s top idea was a long on **TSLA**:

* **Entry:** 431.50
* **Stop:** 428.80
* **Targets:** 434 / 436.20 / 439

📊 Result: All 3 profit targets hit within the first 30 minutes after open. High of the day reached 444.98.

We share **3 new trading ideas every day** in the **Finnext: AI Stock Forecasts.**

comments.author: Helpful-Cut-4903
comments.body: Yes this one was a great trade for me yesterday! I jumped in with high volume and it worked nicely.
